creator: sead@deep.perm.ru
text:
Hi

Its nice to see that somebody track my program and submit
ports with new version. Thanx. But you are too hurry. There
were some minor modifications in tarball since initial 1.00
release. Fix in Makefile for ex.

So here is my own version of ipguard port. Diff with current
one. Sorry everybody for inconvenience. My fault.

Removed files:
security/ipguard/files pkg-message.in
security/ipguard/files

-- 
SeaD <sead@deep.perm.ru>
